economic_notes: Consolidated government businesses include grocery store (Sana'aih Market), logging (Nak'al Koh Logging and Ta Da Chun Timber), and gas station (Nahounli Creek Gas Bar). GBEs include Carrier Food and Fuel Ltd., Nak'al Koh Timber Ltd., Nak'azdli LNG Ltd., Nak'azdli LNG Limited Partnership, Nak'azdli Summit Camp Limited Partnership (50.95%), FNA Resources Ltd. (50%), Shas Resources Limited Partnership (12.5%), and others. Nak'azdli Summit Camp LP generated revenues of $32,673,480 in 2021. COVID-19 pandemic impacts noted.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Total revenue of $38,032,733 includes consolidated GBE revenues of $9,617,109. Prior year (2020) total revenue was $47,824,834 which was significantly higher due to $19,328,451 in Province of BC and other government revenue (vs $5,187,700 in 2021). Other income includes $2,726,421 equity income from GBEs and $2,857,399 natural resource contracts. Ta Da Chun Timber and Tl'oh Forest Products were reclassified from GBE to full consolidation in 2021. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($9,705,160) + FNHA ($2,824,678) + Province of BC ($5,187,700) + CMHC ($80,301) + PGNAETA ($724,365) = $18,522,204. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayments only; capital lease repayment of $42,999 additional. The statement covers a complex consolidation with multiple subsidiaries and GBEs.
